text: For your safety, Phantom has blocked this request.

classification.rationale: The line names an agent ('Phantom'), cites a value ('your safety'), and delivers a settled factual act ('has blocked'). This is Stable in register — governed, measured, benevolent authority — but it reads Light, not Strong: no force/exertion, no accumulating pressure; the action is presented as already resolved and calm. Self-Contained (Stable Light+Direct, p. 497) fits: contained, responsible, unhurried assurance. Weight test: 'blocked' is definitive but not muscular; the tone is protective stillness, not force against resistance. Aspect: Enclosing (Weight-led wrapping/sheltering gesture — 'for your safety'). Stress: time (sustained — the action is presented as already held, not urgently rushing). Motor: Gliding → Dabbing (light, direct — placing the block cleanly). No transient outer-action flashes.
classification.literary_anchor: A calm guardian at the gate — resolved, steady, no drama.
